commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The baseUrl/browser mismatch is a narrow repair candidate; dependency graph approval remains maintainer-owned after the code fix.; Needs attention: The code keeps the browser token scoped to api.x.ai, but the PR changes dependency graph files and therefore needs the repository's dependency approval gate before merge.; Review finding: [P2] Align xAI browser baseUrl handling — ui/src/ui/chat/realtime-talk-xai.t... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an xAI realtime Talk voice provider, browser and gateway-relay transports, xAI Talk UI transport handling, docs, tests, and moves `ws` into the xAI plugin runtime dependencies.

PR surface: Source +1634, Tests +862, Docs +63, Config 0, Other 0. Total +2559 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows `createBrowserSession` returns a configured `websocketUrl` while `buildXaiRealtimeUrl` rejects every host except `api.x.ai`. I did not execute the browser path because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The baseUrl/browser mismatch is a narrow repair candidate; dependency graph approval remains maintainer-owned after the code fix.
